name: Waldorf Red Velvet Cake and Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream shortening and sugar until fluffy.
2. Add eggs and beat for 1 minute.
3. Add salt, then vanilla and coloring to the buttermilk.
4. Alternate adding the flour mixture and milk mixture to the batter.
5. Combine baking soda and vinegar in a separate cup; add to the cake batter.
6. Bake in two 9-inch cake pans at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes.
7. Cool on cake racks.
For the frosting:
1. Cook milk and flour until thick, then cool in the fridge.
2. Beat butter, sugar, and vanilla with a mixer.
3. Add the flour and milk mixture gradually (make ahead of the cake so it has plenty of time to cool).
4. Beat well.
